name: Audrey & Roman — Luxury Editorial
description: Luxury fine jewellery aesthetic for the Audrey & Roman store. Soft natural lighting on premium surfaces.
base_prompt: luxury editorial product photography, high-end jewellery presentation, soft natural lighting, shallow depth of field, minimalist composition, premium magazine aesthetic, crisp focus on the product, subtle warm tones

collection_presets.gold: on polished white carrara marble surface, warm golden hour light coming from the left, soft glow
collection_presets.silver: on cool grey brushed linen, diffused overhead daylight, cool tones
collection_presets.rose-gold: on dusty pink velvet, soft pink window light, romantic and delicate atmosphere
collection_presets.general: on off-white neutral surface with soft shadows, clean minimal background

image_roles.hero: centered hero product shot, product fills 60 percent of frame, clean composition suitable for a main listing photo
image_roles.detail: extreme macro close-up, texture and craftsmanship emphasis, shallow depth of field, gentle shadows showing material detail
image_roles.lifestyle: editorial lifestyle shot, jewellery elegantly worn by a refined hand or displayed in a tasteful context, neutral soft background, magazine feel

negative: no competitor branding, no orange boxes, no Maya Henry's text, no other brand logos or labels, no watermarks, no price tags, no stickers, no cluttered backgrounds, no text overlays, no packaging, no harsh shadows, no oversaturated colors, no cartoon style
